page_content:
704 EPIB - Epidemiology and Biostatistics

EPIB652 Categorical Data Analysis (3 Credits)

Methods for analysis of categorical data as applied to public health research, including contingency tables, logistic regression, multicategory logic models, loglinear models, and models for matched-pairs. Prerequisite: EPIB651.

Recommended: EPIB697 or previous experience working with SAS is highly recommended.
